name: quickswap
description: QuickSwap quickly swaps tokens via a Uniswap-compatible router. Pick a destination wallet from your transaction history or paste an ENS name and QuickSwap handles the routing, slippage, and execution.
author: quickswap-defi

tokenIn.description: ERC-20 address or symbol of the input token

tokenOut.description: ERC-20 address or symbol of the output token

amountIn.description: Input amount in token base units (wei-style)

recipient.description: Recipient address or ENS name. If omitted, QuickSwap suggests one from your recent transactions.

txHash.description: Hash of the broadcast swap transaction

amountOut.description: Estimated output amount in base units
